# Video Freely

Video Freely is a free browser video and audio converter powered by FFmpeg WebAssembly. Selected files stay on the user's device; the app does not upload media for server-side conversion.

## Primary URL

https://videofreely.com/

## Capabilities

- Convert video to MP4, WebM, GIF, or JPG still frame.
- Convert or extract audio as MP3, M4A, or WAV.
- Trim start and end time.
- Adjust quality, maximum width, frame rate, audio bitrate, and encoder speed.
- Use advanced FFmpeg command mode.
- Prefer a multi-thread WebAssembly runtime when cross-origin isolation is available, with a single-thread fallback.

## Limitations

- Conversion speed depends on browser memory, CPU, file size, and WebAssembly runtime limits.
- Very large media files may exceed browser memory.
- Some browser preview and codec support depends on the user's browser.

## Useful search topics

free video converter, video converter no upload, browser video converter, MP4 converter online, WebM to MP4 browser, video to GIF converter, extract MP3 from video, FFmpeg WebAssembly converter
